privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic Maven-based RayPlan project at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/RayPlan with a deliberate infinite loop bug in GradientDescentOptimizer.java. The bug is triggered when processing Patient_003 (complexity 0.9), which causes the error value to oscillate above the tolerance threshold instead of converging, trapping the optimization loop indefinitely. The batch processor attempts to write results to ~/Desktop/dose_report.csv. All metadata claims regarding project directory, optimizer file path, output file location, and buggy patient ID are accurate.
